nasb.text: And He *said to them, “My soul is deeply grieved to the point of death; remain here and keep watch.”

esv.text: And he said to them, “My soul is very sorrowful, even to death. Remain here and watch.”

cnv.text: 於是對他們說：“我的心靈痛苦得快要死了；你們要留在這裡，也要警醒。”

ccb.text: 说：“我心里非常忧伤，几乎要死，你们留在这里警醒。”

csbs.text: 对他们说：“我的灵魂很忧伤，几乎要死。你们留在这里，要警醒。”
